idea-plugin.name: Mutation Method Blocker
idea-plugin.description: Surfaces mutation-method-blocker findings inline in JetBrains IDEs (WebStorm, IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate, PyCharm Professional with JS plugin). The plugin spawns the Python hook in LSP output mode (MUTATION_METHOD_OUTPUT=lsp), parses the JSON diagnostics, and posts them as IDE inspections on the affected lines.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
3.0.0

  • Initial scaffolding. Uses WebStorm 2024.1+ LSP support.
  • Reads MUTATION_METHOD_HOOK_PATH or falls back to the bundled hook.
